title: OFSI General Licence INT/2025/6403704
body: " OFSI General licence INT/2025/6403704 OFSI General licence INT/2025/6403704 Publication notice   On 21 July 2025, OFSI issued General Licence INT/2025/6403704 under Regulation 64 of the Russia (Sanctions) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (“the Russia Regulations”) which allows for the continuation of business operations of vessels owned or operated by, or on behalf of, the Government of the Gabonese Republic "
